sections.paragraph:
Original: און

Transliteration: 'âven

Phonetic: aw'-ven

BDB Definition:

Aven = "vanity"
  1. a name used contemptuously for the following places of idolatrous worship
    1. a city in Egypt, possibly On (Eze 30:17)
    2. Bethel with its calf worship (Hos 10:8)
    3. A town or region in Syria (Amo 1:5)

Origin: the same as H205

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
